titleStmt.title: SII 15.28: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 28. (B.K. No. 194 of 1926-27.) KŌḌĪKOP, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up inside the temple of Mūlabrahmēśvara.

This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Raktākshi, Pushya-amāvāsyā, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, solar eclipse. The date corresponds to 1144 A.D., December 25, Monday, f.d.t. °25. The eclipse, however, occurred on Tuesday.

It describes the king's subordinate Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jagadēkamalla Permāḍi, son of Āchugi-maṇḍalēśa of the Sinda family and states that when he was governing the tracts of Kisukāḍu, Bāgaḍage, Keḷavāḍi and Narayaṁgallu, gifts of income derived from the cess on betel leaves, oil-mill, etc., were made for the worship and offering of the god Mūlasthāna Brahmēśvara of Kiṟunarayaṁgal in Kisukāḍu-70 by the Taṁbuliga One Thousand, Ugura Three Hundred, and others. It mentions the teacher Vāmaśakti as the family priest of Permmāḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē ©
© namaśśāśvatikānaṁdajñānaiśvaryyamayātmanē saṁkaḷpasaphalabrahmastaṁbhāraṁbhāya śaṁbhavē ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaparamēśvare para
mabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu pratāpacakrava
rtti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire © Ā mahānubhāvana pādapadmōpajīvi . Ācugimaṁḍa ḷēśana ta
nūbhavanugravirōdhi maṁḍaḷēśācaḷavajranapratimapauruṣanunnatakīrttiyiṁ
da nāggōcaranārggaveṁbinagavī jagamellamaneyde suttugoṁḍāvarisirdda jasaduṁnnatiyiṁ
kali permmabhūbhuja . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara . virōdhi maṁ
ḍaḷika madanamahēśvara . nijanāmāvaḷīvirājitarappa śrīmanumahāmaṁ
ḍaḷēśvaraṁ jagadēkamallapermāḍidēvarasarkkisukāḍunāḍumaṁ bāgaḍagenāḍumaṁ ke
ḷavāḍināḍumaṁ nareyaṁgallu maṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipā
ḷanammāḍi rājadhāni noḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge yyu
ttamire . v® . poredā nabhavaṁ brahmēśvaraṁ niccavāda radiṁ
darccisuttirppa tanna kuladeyvaṁ vāmaśaktibratīśvararārādhyanenalke peṁpana
ninnēvaṇnipaṁ baṇnipaṁ naranī molleya yācaṁṇanaṁ dharmmātmanaṁ barmmanaṁ . śrī
vāmaśaktipaṁḍitadēvarmmadhyāhnakāmadhēnuvenippī bhūvaḷeyaviditakī
rttiyanāvarisidareṁdoḍavaranē vaṇṇipudu . gurugaḻu tapōdhanarppurahara
niṣṭadeyvarvuguramūnūrvvarggaccariyenipa dānaguṇavābhareṇaṁ kē
vaḷame sujanacūḍāmaṇigaṇa . paravanitālōluparaṁ paradhanakāṁkṣi
taranucitavaṟiyada vidhyādhararenisirddeleya bo
jagarevembadu . svasti śrīmatu pratāpacakravartti jagadēka
mallavarṣada neya raktākṣi saṁvatsarada puṣyadamavāsya sōmavāra Uttarā
yaṇa saṁkramaṇa vyatīpāta sūryyagyahaṇadandu kisukāḍeppatta
ṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ kiṟunareyaṁgalla śrī mūlasthāna brahmēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōga
kke taṁbuligasāsirvvaraśēśamirddu kiṟunareyaṁgalla koydeleya hēṟiṁge vīsavoṁdu ttaradēvargge
levoṟege kāgiṇiyeraḍu . mattavā dēvara nandādīvigege sarvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭa
gāṇavondu . brahmēśvaradēvargguguramūnūrvvaruṁmeleyabojaṁgara
ynūṟanālvaru yaśēśamirddu pratyēka vokkalalondu paṇamaṁ dēvaraṁgabhō
gakke biṭṭaru . Ummacigeya voroḍeyapramukha mahājana nūṟanālva
ra kayyoḷu molleya bammaṇnaṁ sarvvanamaśyamāge māṟugoṁḍu Ūriṁ mūḍa
kukkanūra baṭṭeya gottina kalliṁ baḍaga tanna brahmēśvaradēvargge biṭṭa mattaru ha
nneraḍu . Intī sthānemaṁ pratipāḷisidargge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrava
rghyatīrtthameṁba divyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sūryyagrahaṇadandu divyatapōdha
narggaṁ vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarggaṁ sahasrakavilegaḷanaḷaṁkārasahitaṁ koṭṭa
puṇyaphaḷamakku Idanaḷidātanā tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷā tapōdhanarumanā brāhmaṇaru
manā kavilegaḷmanaḷida mahāpātakanakku . © .
Digital edition of SII 15.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
